comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Adjusted design per review: Ralph now captures the effective sandbox profile during /ralph start and stores it in the Ralph loop state. Iteration child sessions receive that stored profile from loop state, including on /ralph resume, so current-session sandbox changes at resume time do not override the loop's start-time sandbox.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Follow-up: existing Ralph loop states may lack ralph.sandboxProfile. Made sandboxProfile null-backed optional in loop schemas and added migration behavior: missing sandboxProfile decodes as none, and the next Ralph iteration captures the current sandbox profile, stores it back into loop state, and initializes the child session from it. Added regression for a paused legacy loop whose JSON lacks ralph.sandboxProfile.
